0400-0800: 0530 The Chilean torpedo launch Fresia accompanied by the Tolteu came in and began to bombard the town. Firing returned from shore. The Engagement continued until 0615 when both vessels stood out again and communicated with the Chilean Man of War Chacabuco

0800-1200: 0800 Chilean gunboat Pilcomayo transport Tilteu and Chilean torpedo boat came in and opened fire on a Peruvian Torpedo boat hauled up on the beach in Ancon. The fire was returned by a few small arm men from shore. Pilcomayo continued firing until 11 when Tolteu and torpedo boat left for Callao and at 1200 Pilcomayo went out heading North. At 1025 Ancon was set on fire by the Pilcomayo
